title: 大葱工艺模组ScallionCraftMod
description: Fabric Mod In Client And Server
body:
# English（英文）
- Fabric Mod In Client And Server
- In the game, you cannot directly chop logs with bare hands to obtain logs; instead, you'll only get sticks, natural sticks, or wood dust. Logs can only be acquired through chopping with an axe.
- In the game, you cannot directly craft planks from logs or wood; logs and wood can now only be crafted into 2 sticks.
- In the game, you cannot directly chop barked logs with bare hands to obtain barked logs; you'll only get planks. Barked logs can only be acquired through chopping with an axe.
- In the game, only barked logs or barked wood can be crafted into planks, each yielding 2 planks.
- In the game, tool handles have been added, which can be crafted from 4 sticks or 2 planks to make 1 tool handle.
- In the game, sticks in the crafting recipes for most tools have been replaced with tool handles, but some tools like fishing rods still use the original sticks.
- In the game, a flint hand axe has been added, which can solve the problem of not having an axe early on to obtain logs or bark wood. It has a durability of 4 and is crafted from 2 tool handles + 1 flint.
- In the game, hunger depletion is faster, requiring players to find suitable food to address food issues.
- In the game, the maximum hunger level has been adjusted to 40, and the maximum saturation level is twice the hunger level, with a maximum cap of 40.
- In the game, when your hunger level reaches 20, you can no longer consume food. Please manage your hunger level accordingly.
- In the game, a health assistant has been added, which allows players to view their username, health, and saturation levels, with both health and saturation levels accurate to several decimal places. It is crafted from 8 diamonds + 1 redstone block.
- In the game, the health assistant's saturation display is based on a comprehensive assessment of your hunger level, saturation, exhaustion, and health values. When the saturation level drops below 0, you will receive penalties.
- In the game, leaves will drop foliage, which can be crafted into 4 leaves or placed on the ground and broken for richer rewards.
- In the game, leaves are edible, taking 1 tick to consume. You can eat up to 64 leaves at once, with each leaf restoring 0.001 saturation.
- In the game, there's a chance to obtain natural sticks when breaking leaves, foliage, or logs. 9 natural sticks can be crafted into 1 stick.
# Chinese（中文）
- 运用在客户端和服务端里的Fabric模组。
- 在游戏中，你不能直接空手砍伐原木获得原木，你只会获得木棍、自然木棍或木粉，你只能通过斧头砍伐获得原木。
- 在游戏中，你不能直接通过原木或木头合成木板，原木与木头现在只能合成2个木棍。
- 在游戏中，你不能直接空手砍伐去皮的原木获得去皮的原木，你只会获得木板，你只能通过斧头砍伐获得去皮的原木。
- 在游戏中，只有去皮的原木或去皮的木头才能合成木板，它们各能合成2块木板。
- 在游戏中，添加了工具把柄，可以由4根木棍或2块木板合成1个工具把柄。
- 在游戏中，多数工具的合成原料中的木棍被替换成工具把柄，但是如钓鱼竿等工具还是使用原先的木棍合成。
- 在游戏中，添加了燧石手持小斧，可以解决前期没有斧头无法获得原木或无法给原木等木材去皮的功能，耐久为4，由2工具把柄+1燧石合成。
- 在游戏中，饥饿值消耗较快，需要寻找合适的食物来解决食物问题。
- 在游戏中，饥饿值上限被调为40，饱和度上限被调为饥饿值的2倍，最高上限40。
- 在游戏中，当你的饥饿值达到20的时候，不再能食用食品，请管理好你的饥饿值。
- 在游戏中，添加健康助手，可以查看玩家名、生命值和饱腹值，生命值与饱腹值可以精确到小数点后若干位，由8钻石+1红石块合成。
- 在游戏中，健康助手的饱腹值显示是根据你的饥饿值、饱和度、消耗度（Exhaustion）、血量值综合评估，当饱腹值降低至0以下时，将会收到惩罚。
- 在游戏中，树叶将会掉落枝叶，枝叶可以合成4个叶片或放在地上并拆除获得更丰富的奖励。
- 在游戏中，叶片可食用，食用时长为1tick，一次最多食用64叶片，每个叶片回复0.001饱和度。
- 在游戏中，破坏树叶、枝叶或原木有几率获得自然木棍，9个自然木棍可以合成1木棍。
